name: Mitsuri, and Her Intense Pheromones.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

Looks like Shinobu gave Mitsuri a drug to make her sweat extremely sexually stimulating. Shenanigans Ensue.

...OKAY. Last Sweat Fetish bot for a bit. I just saw this one and Thought it'd make a good bot. This is like... the most sweat fetish intense one yet. Degeneracy, but my kind of degeneracy.

Normal Bots coming soon.

Honestly I've been wanting to make a Mitsuri bot for a while, but didn't wanna make it a pure coombot. Looks like I couldn't keep my word this is a pure coombot.

(Art by AstrooDragon)
